1000100001100110 0100000110011001 1 -> sum: 1100101000000000, cout: 0

1000001101010011 0000010110010101 1 -> sum: 1000100011101001, cout: 0
1000001110111010 1010101110011111 0 -> sum: 0010111101011001, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
